purpose: Hand-curated calendar of high-impact macro events that move SPY 0DTE. Premarket reads this every day, filters to today's date, and writes any matches into today-bias.news_calendar.events_today[]. Heartbeat filter 2 then enforces no-trade windows around events.

maintenance.owner: J -- manual edit (autonomous refresh by EOD pipeline / wake fires)
maintenance.review_cadence: monthly (first Sunday of each month -- refresh with next 30 days of FOMC dates from federalreserve.gov, BLS releases from bls.gov/schedule, and earnings dates from nasdaq.com/earnings/earnings-calendar)
rules: Only include events that historically move SPY >= 0.3% in 30 minutes (FOMC, CPI, NFP, PCE, retail sales, GDP, big-tech mega-cap earnings before/after market).
Times are ET. 24-hour clock. Never use 12-hour AM/PM here -- heartbeat parses HH:MM literally.

Severity: high (FOMC, CPI, NFP, NVDA/AAPL/MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN earnings) | med (PPI, retail sales, PCE, GDP, jobless claims when in focus) | low (consumer confidence, housing) -- heartbeat only blocks on high+med.
Per OP 18: every event MUST cite source URL. No speculation. If a source is unreachable, log it in fetch_failures and do not invent dates.

no_trade_window_rules.doc: How premarket converts an event into a no-trade window. Heartbeat filter 2 reads no_trade_window directly; events_today is for journal context.

cpi_release.reason: 8:30 release prints; market re-prices in first 30 min

nfp_release.reason: Same pattern as CPI -- 8:30 print, fast re-price

ppi_release.reason: Less violent than CPI but still a known whipsaw

gdp_release.reason: Quarterly print, can shift bias for the day

industrial_production.reason: 9:15 ET print -- minor whipsaw, mostly fades by 9:35

empire_state_manufacturing.reason: 8:30 ET print -- pre-market only, sets tone for open

michigan_sentiment.reason: 10:00 ET RTH release -- direct mid-morning impact, especially inflation expectations component

new_home_sales.reason: 10:00 ET RTH release -- minor mid-morning impact

mega_cap_earnings_amc.reason: After-market -- no RTH block, but flag for next-day open gap risk

mega_cap_earnings_bmo.reason: If earnings hit before open, the gap is already in the price by 09:30 -- but watch for re-price aftershocks in first hour

events_30d.notes: Statement at 14:00 ET; Powell press conference at 14:30 ET. Two-day meeting 6/16-6/17 -- decision day is 6/17. Block 13:30-15:00 hard. SEP release this meeting.
Guggenheim calendar confirms June 25. Fed's preferred inflation gauge -- final May read before July FOMC. Pre-market release.

Used scheduled_recurring.second_or_third_tuesday + BLS standard 10-14 day post-month-end. CPI for May 2026 inferred as 2026-06-11.
Existing 2026-05-15 PPI entry REMOVED -- cannot verify against BLS.
Used stockanalysis.com per-ticker pages for NVDA + WMT confirmation.

scheduled_recurring.doc: Patterns that recur reliably; premarket can derive these even if events_30d isn't fresh. Rules of thumb only -- verify against bls.gov/schedule.

second_or_third_tuesday.note: BLS publishes around 10-14 days after month end; check exact date
